channel.title: Cs.AI on 技术观察学习者
channel.description: Recent content in Cs.AI on 技术观察学习者

item.title: From Research Question to Scientific Workflow: Leveraging Agentic AI for Science Automation
item.description: 论文信息 标题: From Research Question to Scientific Workflow: Leveraging Agentic AI for Science Automation 作者: Bartosz Balis, Michal Orzechowski, Piotr Kica, Michal Dygas, Michal Kuszewski 发表日期: 2026-04-23 arXiv ID: 2604.21910v1 PDF 链接: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.21910v1 分类 cs.AI 摘要 Scientific workflow systems automate execution – scheduling, fault tolerance, resource management – but not the semantic translation that precedes it. Scientists still manually convert research questions into workflow specifications, a task requiring both domain knowledge and infrastructure expertise.

item.title: Nemobot Games: Crafting Strategic AI Gaming Agents for Interactive Learning with Large Language Models
item.description: 论文信息 标题: Nemobot Games: Crafting Strategic AI Gaming Agents for Interactive Learning with Large Language Models 作者: Chee Wei Tan, Yuchen Wang, Shangxin Guo 发表日期: 2026-04-23 arXiv ID: 2604.21896v1 PDF 链接: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.21896v1 分类 cs.AI 摘要 This paper introduces a new paradigm for AI game programming, leveraging large language models (LLMs) to extend and operationalize Claude Shannon’s taxonomy of game-playing machines. Central to this paradigm is Nemobot, an interactive agentic engineering environment that enables users to create, customize, and deploy LLM-powered game agents while actively engaging with AI-driven strategies.
